subcodes.title: Lawh-i-Khurasan
subcodes.first_line: O zephyr of God blow forth with fragrance! O breeze of God waft by sweetly scented! Hasten to the valley of the Merciful
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایا نفحات الله هبی معطره و ایا نسمه الله مری مطیبه و اقصدی وادی الرحمن نادی
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @historical episodes and the lessons of the past, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @forces of light and darkness; integration and disintegration, @spiritual transformation, @praise and encouragement, @chastisement and requital, @consolation and comfort
